topics.summary: GIMP's windows, single-window mode, docks and dialogs, the menu map, zoom/navigation/undo, and image Mode and Encoding (bit depth).
The Toolbox and Tool Options dialog, the five tool categories, and a catalog of tools with their default keyboard shortcuts.
The layer stack and Layers dialog, layer attributes, groups, the alpha channel, and the default and legacy blend-mode names.
Partial/feathered selections, the four selection tool modes, anti-aliasing, and the Select menu operations.

topics.topic: Layer Masks, Channels, and Quick Mask
topics.summary: Layer masks and the white/black direction, the Channels dialog, saving/loading selections to channels, and Quick Mask.
Bézier paths, the Paths tool and dialog, stroking a path, converting between path and selection, and SVG import/export.
The Colors menu adjustment operations and color management, including the assign-versus-convert ICC-profile distinction.
The Filters menu category taxonomy and the Repeat Last / Re-Show Last commands.
Opening and importing, saving the native .xcf, exporting/overwriting other formats, and PNG/JPEG export options.
Script-Fu vs Python-Fu, the Script-Fu Console and Start Server, installing scripts/plug-ins, and headless/batch command-line flags.
What the PDB is, the Procedure Browser, procedure naming conventions, parameter/return types, and calling procedures from either language.
Scheme syntax (let*, car/cdr, define), calling PDB procedures, and the script-fu-register / script-fu-menu-register argument order.
Python 3 with GObject Introspection: the gi import preamble and the Gimp.PlugIn registration model (do_query_procedures / do_create_procedure / run).
Worked Script-Fu recipes using real procedure names: create an image and layer, fill, resize, move, and flatten.
A map of selection and path menu commands to automate, with the verified-name calling pattern and Procedure Browser routing.
A map of Colors-menu adjustments and filters to automate, with the verified-name calling pattern and Procedure Browser routing.

topics.topic: PDB Recipes: File I/O and Batch
topics.summary: Save vs export patterns, flatten-before-export, and the verbatim headless/batch command-line flags for running GIMP non-interactively.
